case_title: CASTLE PEAK 2010-1 LOAN TRUST VS. JAMES E. PIERCE II et al

docket_entries.description: MINUTE ORDER RE: DENYING WITHOUT PREJUDICE SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT BY POSTING AND MAILING
